title: Alaska Native Settlement Trust Eligibility Act
short_title: Alaska Native Settlement Trust Eligibility Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
crs_summary: Alaska Native Settlement Trust Eligibility Act This bill excludes certain settlement trust payments to an Alaska Native or descendant of an Alaska Native who is aged, blind, or disabled for purposes of determining the individual's eligibility for certain need-based federal programs (e.g., the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program).
